title: subscribe_events stream return type missing + Send bound
description: Why: subscribe_events returns impl futures::Stream<...> without + Send. The stream captures a reqwest ByteStream and a String buffer, both of which are Send, so the bound is satisfiable. Without it, callers that tokio::spawn the consumer get a confusing trait bounds error rather than a clear type. What: Add + Send to the impl Trait return type. Verify with a compile-only test that asserts the stream is Send.
